description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the geertw/docker-php-ci:7.1 Docker image and caches the vendor/ directory. Define three stages: test, install, and deploy. In the test stage add a check_php_syntax job that runs the command `find ./ -name "*.php" -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 -P4 php -l`. In the install stage add a run job that executes `php -v` in a before_script step and then runs `composer install`. In the deploy stage add a deploy job targeting a production environment at https://packagist.org/packages/paveltizek/gitlab-api, which runs a curl POST to the Packagist update API with the JSON payload `{"repository":{"url":"https://packagist.org/packages/paveltizek/gitlab-api"}}`.
